name: Demo LLM Connector
description: DEMO ONLY — shows how a backend module declares LLM connector requirements and exposes a generate action. Contains mock logic only.

connectors.name: reasoning_api
connectors.description: LLM reasoning endpoint — injected at runtime by Morphius Connect (e.g. OpenAI, Anthropic, local Ollama)

secretRefs.name: LLM_API_KEY
secretRefs.description: API key for the LLM provider — name only, real value injected by Morphius Connect

actions.name: Generate
actions.description: Send a prompt to the configured LLM and return the response. MOCK in this demo.

actions.name: Stream Generate
actions.description: Stream tokens from the LLM. MOCK in this demo.
